content.thinking: Phase 1 is running. I need to wait for Phase 2 to start and then scale to 10 workers. Let me monitor the logs continuously and check every few seconds for phase transitions.

content.text: Phase 1 is active. I'll poll the traffic generator logs in a loop and scale at each phase transition.

input.command:
# Poll until we see PHASE 2 or beyond
for i in $(seq 1 120); do
  LOGS=$(kubectl logs -n spark-streaming -l app=traffic-generator --tail=30 2>&1)
  echo "$LOGS" | tail -5
  echo "---"
  if echo "$LOGS" | grep -q "PHASE 2"; then
    echo ">>> PHASE 2 DETECTED - scaling to 10 workers"
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
input.description: Poll traffic generator logs until Phase 2 is detected

content.text: Two scaling events logged. Now monitoring for Phase 4 (cooldown).

input.command:
# Poll until we see PHASE 4
for i in $(seq 1 180); do
  LOGS=$(kubectl logs -n spark-streaming -l app=traffic-generator --tail=30 2>&1)
  echo "$LOGS" | tail -5
  echo "---"
  if echo "$LOGS" | grep -q "PHASE 4"; then
    echo ">>> PHASE 4 DETECTED - scaling back to 5 workers"
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
input.description: Poll traffic generator logs until Phase 4 (cooldown) is detected
